'''Rruurrfhurra''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] firefighter from [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]], on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Rruurrfhurra served as coordinator of the firefighters in his home city.<ref name="Kashyyyk in Flames" />

In the course of investigating a fire in the office of [[Turren Lonarr]], Rruurrfhurra was shot dead. He had gotten too close to uncovering Lonarr's work bringing in [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] hunters to Kashyyyk.<ref name="Kashyyyk in Flames" />
